vi: Cach dua nguoi choi moi vao game bang paid, organic, store va product loops.
Chuoi hanh vi tu impression den install, first session, return va revenue.
Chi phi trung binh de co mot install.
Ty le nguoi click sau khi thay quang cao.
Ty le chuyen doi, thuong la click sang install hoac store view sang install.
So install tren 1000 impressions, dung de doc creative efficiency.
Ty le nguoi choi quay lai sau mot khoang thoi gian.
Nhom user cung ngay install, channel, creative hoac dieu kien test.

en: Average revenue per daily active user
vi: Doanh thu trung binh tren moi active user trong ngay.
Gia tri ky vong mot user tao ra trong vong doi su dung game.
Doanh thu attributed so voi spend trong mot time window.
Khoang thoi gian ky vong campaign thu hoi du chi phi.
Ra mat gioi han de hoc truoc khi scale rong.
Do phu hop giua genre, audience, monetization va kha nang san xuat.
Thu nghiem hook/format/variant de hoc dong luc nao keo user chat luong.
Khi asset quang cao giam hieu qua do lap lai hoac het audience phu hop.
Quang cao co trai nghiem tuong tac mo phong gameplay.
Toi uu store listing de tang discoverability va install conversion.
Cau truc chay ads gom muc tieu, budget, channel, audience va creatives.
He thong ten event va parameter on dinh phuc vu measurement.
Gan install/event/revenue ve nguon quang cao hoac channel.
Co che iOS yeu cau user consent cho cross-app tracking.
He thong attribution bao ve privacy cua Apple cho install va post-install signal.
Framework attribution cua Apple can hieu trong boi canh iOS privacy.
So observation/install du de doc signal voi do tin cay phu hop.
Loi hua/angle dau tien trong creative de keo su chu y cua player.
Trang store gom icon, screenshot, video, title, description va disclosure.
Trai nghiem dau tien giup player hieu va cam gia tri cua game.
Thong tin store/conpliance ve du lieu app thu thap va chia se.
